title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
summary: Google DeepMind announced that SynthID, an imperceptible watermarking system for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners. SynthID embeds invisible watermarks into AI outputs to enable detection and attribution of synthetic content.
